seo.title: Best House Cleaning in Dallas, TX | Reyes Maids by Monarca Home Services
seo.description: Reyes Maids offers top-rated house cleaning in Dallas, TX. Professional, eco-friendly, and reliable home cleaning services. Free quote.

hero.headline: Your Home, Sparkling Clean – Every Time
hero.subheadline: Trusted by Dallas homeowners for thorough, reliable, and eco-friendly house cleaning.

featureSections.title: Safe for Your Family & Pets
featureSections.body: We use non-toxic, biodegradable products that leave your home spotless without harsh chemicals. Perfect for households with children and pets.
featureSections.cardBody: Our green cleaning solutions protect your family and the planet.

featureSections.title: Every Corner, Every Surface
featureSections.body: Our trained team follows a 50-point checklist to ensure no spot is missed. From baseboards to ceiling fans, we go above and beyond.
featureSections.cardBody: We treat your home like our own – with meticulous attention to detail.

whyChooseUs.title: Reliable & Punctual
whyChooseUs.description: We arrive on time, every time, and complete the job within the estimated window.

whyChooseUs.title: Fully Insured
whyChooseUs.description: Your home and belongings are protected with our comprehensive liability insurance.

whyChooseUs.title: Customizable Plans
whyChooseUs.description: Choose from weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cleanings – or a one-time deep clean.

whyChooseUs.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
whyChooseUs.description: If you're not happy, we'll re-clean any area for free.

cta.headline: Ready for a Cleaner Home?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your free consultation today and see the Reyes Maids difference.

servicesPage.intro: At Reyes Maids, we offer a full range of house cleaning services tailored to your needs. Whether you need a one-time deep clean or regular maintenance, our team delivers consistent, high-quality results.

services.title: Standard House Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Regular maintenance cleaning for a consistently clean home.
services.longDescription: Our standard cleaning service covers all the essentials: dusting, vacuuming, mopping, kitchen and bathroom cleaning, and more. Perfect for weekly or bi-weekly upkeep.
benefits: Frees up your time for what matters
Extends the life of surfaces and furnishings

process.title: Walkthrough
process.description: We review your priorities and any special instructions.

process.title: Cleaning
process.description: Our team follows a detailed checklist to clean every room.

process.title: Final Inspection
process.description: We walk through with you to ensure satisfaction.

faqs.question: How long does a standard clean take?
faqs.answer: Typically 1-3 hours depending on home size and condition.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home?
faqs.answer: Not necessarily. Many clients provide a key or code for access.

services.title: Deep Cleaning
services.shortDescription: A thorough, top-to-bottom clean for neglected areas.
services.longDescription: Our deep cleaning service goes beyond the surface to tackle grime, dust, and dirt in every nook and cranny. Ideal for move-in/move-out or seasonal refreshes.
benefits: Restores the look and feel of your home
Perfect for new move-ins or post-renovation

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We identify high-traffic areas and stubborn spots.

process.title: Deep Scrub
process.description: We scrub, wipe, and polish all surfaces, inside and out.

process.title: Sanitization
process.description: We disinfect high-touch areas for a healthier home.

faqs.question: How often should I deep clean?
faqs.answer: We recommend every 3-6 months for optimal home hygiene.

faqs.question: Do you clean inside appliances?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can include oven, fridge, and microwave interiors upon request.

services.title: Move-In/Move-Out Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Make moving easier with a spotless clean for your old or new home.
services.longDescription: Our move-in/move-out service ensures your property is in pristine condition for the next occupants or for your own fresh start. We cover every detail so you can focus on the move.
benefits: Helps you get your security deposit back
Saves time and stress during moving
Leaves a great impression on buyers or landlords

process.title: Pre-Clean Walkthrough
process.description: We note any specific areas needing extra attention.

process.title: Full-Service Cleaning
process.description: We clean all rooms, including windows, baseboards, and blinds.

process.title: Final Check
process.description: We ensure every surface is spotless and ready for move-in.

faqs.question: Do you clean carpets?
faqs.answer: We offer basic spot cleaning; for full carpet shampooing, we recommend a specialist.

faqs.question: Can you work around my furniture?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can clean around furniture or move small items as needed.

services.title: Eco-Friendly Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Green cleaning solutions for a healthy home and planet.
services.longDescription: Our eco-friendly cleaning service uses only non-toxic, biodegradable products that are safe for children, pets, and the environment. Enjoy a clean home without harsh chemicals.
benefits: Leaves no chemical residue on surfaces

process.title: Product Selection
process.description: We choose EPA Safer Choice certified products.

process.title: Gentle Cleaning
process.description: We use microfiber and plant-based cleaners for effective yet safe cleaning.

process.title: Green Verification
process.description: We confirm all products used are eco-friendly and explain the benefits.

faqs.question: Are the products really safe for pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our green products are non-toxic and pet-safe.

faqs.question: Is eco-friendly cleaning as effective?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Modern green cleaners are just as powerful as traditional ones.

about.headline: Dallas’s Home Cleaning Specialists
about.mission: To provide exceptional, eco-friendly cleaning services that make every home shine while respecting the environment.
story: Reyes Maids was founded by Monarca Home Services with a simple mission: deliver reliable, high-quality house cleaning that Dallas families can count on. We started with a small team and a commitment to using safe, effective products. Over the years, we’ve grown into a trusted name in home cleaning, serving hundreds of satisfied customers across the city.

Our team is trained, insured, and passionate about cleanliness. We believe that a clean home creates peace of mind, and we take pride in being part of our clients’ lives. Whether it’s a weekly touch-up or a deep clean before a special occasion, we treat every home with the same care and attention we would our own.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up on time and deliver consistent results every visit.

coreValues.title: Transparency
coreValues.description: No hidden fees, clear communication, and honest pricing.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use proven methods and high standards to ensure a thorough clean.

coreValues.title: Sustainability
coreValues.description: We prioritize eco-friendly practices to protect our planet.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready for a cleaner home? Contact us today for a free quote.
